name: wuhujing
description: Cloudflare Workers + KV shortlink service with admin panel

LINKS.description: KV namespace used to store shortlink mappings and indexes.

FILES.description: R2 bucket binding used to store uploaded files. Default bucket name: `cflink-files`.

ADMIN_PASS.description: Admin panel password. Change the default value before first use.

LONG_DOMAIN_BLACKLIST.description: Optional blocked long URL domains. Leave empty if unused. Supports multiple lines or comma-separated values.

SUFFIX_BLACKLIST.description: Optional blocked shortlink suffixes. Leave empty if unused. Supports multiple lines or comma-separated values.
